src/FeatureFlags.Tests/FeatureFlagExceptionExtensionsTests.cs
```csharp
#nullable enable

using System;
using FeatureFlags.Exceptions;
using Xunit;

namespace FeatureFlags.Tests
{
    public class FeatureFlagExceptionExtensionsTests
    {
        // ---------- Null argument tests ----------
        [Fact]
        public void IsFeatureFlagNotFound_NullException_ThrowsArgumentNullException()
        {
            FeatureFlagException? ex = null;
            Assert.Throws<ArgumentNullException>(() => ex!.IsFeatureFlagNotFound());
        }

        [Fact]
        public void IsInvalidFeatureFlag_NullException_ThrowsArgumentNullException()
        {
            FeatureFlagException? ex = null;
            Assert.Throws<ArgumentNullException>(() => ex!.IsInvalidFeatureFlag());
        }

        [Fact]
        public void IsRuleEvaluationError_NullException_ThrowsArgumentNullException()
        {
            FeatureFlagException? ex = null;
            Assert.Throws<ArgumentNullException>(() => ex!.IsRuleEvaluationError());
        }

        [Fact]
        public void IsDataError_NullException_ThrowsArgumentNullException()
        {
            FeatureFlagException? ex = null;
            Assert.Throws<ArgumentNullException>(() => ex!.IsDataError());
        }

        [Fact]
        public void GetErrorCode_NullException_ThrowsArgumentNullException()
        {
            FeatureFlagException? ex = null;
            Assert.Throws<ArgumentNullException>(() => ex!.GetErrorCode());
        }

        [Fact]
        public void GetFlattenedMessage_NullException_ThrowsArgumentNullException()
        {
            FeatureFlagException? ex = null;
            Assert.Throws<ArgumentNullException>(() => ex!.GetFlattenedMessage());
        }

        [Fact]
        public void HasErrorCode_NullException_ThrowsArgumentNullException()
        {
            FeatureFlagException? ex = null;
            Assert.Throws<ArgumentNullException>(() => ex!.HasErrorCode("ANY"));
        }

        [Fact]
        public void HasErrorCode_NullErrorCode_ThrowsArgumentNullException()
        {
            var ex = new FeatureFlagException("msg");
            Assert.Throws<ArgumentNullException>(() => ex.HasErrorCode(null!));
        }

        // ---------- Happy path tests ----------
        [Fact]
        public void IsFeatureFlagNotFound_WithFeatureFlagNotFoundException_ReturnsTrue()
        {
            var ex = new FeatureFlagNotFoundException("not found");
            Assert.True(ex.IsFeatureFlagNotFound());
        }

        [Fact]
        public void IsFeatureFlagNotFound_WithOtherException_ReturnsFalse()
        {
            var ex = new InvalidFeatureFlagException("invalid");
            Assert.False(ex.IsFeatureFlagNotFound());
        }

        [Fact]
        public void IsInvalidFeatureFlag_WithInvalidFeatureFlagException_ReturnsTrue()
        {
            var ex = new InvalidFeatureFlagException("invalid");
            Assert.True(ex.IsInvalidFeatureFlag());
        }

        [Fact]
        public void IsInvalidFeatureFlag_WithOtherException_ReturnsFalse()
        {
            var ex = new FeatureFlagNotFoundException("not found");
            Assert.False(ex.IsInvalidFeatureFlag());
        }

        [Fact]
        public void IsRuleEvaluationError_WithRuleEvaluationException_ReturnsTrue()
        {
            var ex = new RuleEvaluationException("rule error");
            Assert.True(ex.IsRuleEvaluationError());
        }

        [Fact]
        public void IsRuleEvaluationError_WithOtherException_ReturnsFalse()
        {
            var ex = new FeatureFlagDataException("data error");
            Assert.False(ex.IsRuleEvaluationError());
        }

        [Fact]
        public void IsDataError_WithFeatureFlagDataException_ReturnsTrue()
        {
            var ex = new FeatureFlagDataException("data error");
            Assert.True(ex.IsDataError());
        }

        [Fact]
        public void IsDataError_WithOtherException_ReturnsFalse()
        {
            var ex = new RuleEvaluationException("rule error");
            Assert.False(ex.IsDataError());
        }

        [Fact]
        public void GetErrorCode_ReturnsErrorCode_WhenSet()
        {
            var ex = new FeatureFlagException("msg", "ERR123");
            Assert.Equal("ERR123", ex.GetErrorCode());
        }

        [Fact]
        public void GetErrorCode_ReturnsNull_WhenErrorCodeNotSet()
        {
            var ex = new FeatureFlagException("msg");
            Assert.Null(ex.GetErrorCode());
        }

        [Fact]
        public void GetFlattenedMessage_FlattensInnerFeatureFlagExceptions()
        {
            var innerMost = new FeatureFlagException("inner most");
            var middle = new FeatureFlagException("middle", innerException: innerMost);
            var outer = new FeatureFlagException("outer", innerException: middle);

            var result = outer.GetFlattenedMessage();

            // Expected order: outer | middle | inner most
            Assert.Equal("outer | middle | inner most", result);
        }

        [Fact]
        public void GetFlattenedMessage_StopsAtNonFeatureFlagException()
        {
            var inner = new Exception("non-ff");
            var outer = new FeatureFlagException("outer", innerException: inner);

            var result = outer.GetFlattenedMessage();

            // Only the outer message should be included because inner is not a FeatureFlagException
            Assert.Equal("outer", result);
        }

        [Fact]
        public void HasErrorCode_MatchesExactCode_ReturnsTrue()
        {
            var ex = new FeatureFlagException("msg", "CODE42");
            Assert.True(ex.HasErrorCode("CODE42"));
        }

        [Fact]
        public void HasErrorCode_DifferentCode_ReturnsFalse()
        {
            var ex = new FeatureFlagException("msg", "CODE42");
            Assert.False(ex.HasErrorCode("OTHER"));
        }

        [Fact]
        public void HasErrorCode_NullErrorCodeOnException_ReturnsFalse()
        {
            var ex = new FeatureFlagException("msg");
            Assert.False(ex.HasErrorCode("ANY"));
        }
    }
}
```

src/FeatureFlags.Tests/ValidationExceptionExtensionsTests.cs
```
using Xunit;
using FeatureFlags.Exceptions;

namespace FeatureFlags.Tests
{
    public class ValidationExceptionExtensionsTests
    {
        [Fact]
        public void HasErrors_ReturnsTrue_WhenValidationExceptionHasErrors()
        {
            // Arrange
            var validationException = new ValidationException(new Dictionary<string, string> { { "key", "value" } });

            // Act
            var result = validationException.HasErrors();

            // Assert
            Assert.True(result);
        }

        [Fact]
        public void HasErrors_ReturnsFalse_WhenValidationExceptionDoesNotHaveErrors()
        {
            // Arrange
            var validationException = new ValidationException(new Dictionary<string, string>());

            // Act
            var result = validationException.HasErrors();

            // Assert
            Assert.False(result);
        }

        [Fact]
        public void HasErrors_ThrowsArgumentNullException_WhenValidationExceptionIsNull()
        {
            // Arrange
            ValidationException validationException = null;

            // Act and Assert
            Assert.Throws<ArgumentNullException>(() => validationException.HasErrors());
        }

        [Fact]
        public void GetErrorMessage_ReturnsErrorMessage_WhenKeyExistsInValidationException()
        {
            // Arrange
            var validationException = new ValidationException(new Dictionary<string, string> { { "key", "value" } });

            // Act
            var result = validationException.GetErrorMessage("key");

            // Assert
            Assert.Equal("value", result);
        }

        [Fact]
        public void GetErrorMessage_ReturnsEmptyString_WhenKeyDoesNotExistInValidationException()
        {
            // Arrange
            var validationException = new ValidationException(new Dictionary<string, string> { { "key", "value" } });

            // Act
            var result = validationException.GetErrorMessage("non-existent-key");

            // Assert
            Assert.Empty(result);
        }

        [Fact]
        public void GetErrorMessage_ThrowsArgumentNullException_WhenValidationExceptionIsNull()
        {
            // Arrange
            ValidationException validationException = null;

            // Act and Assert
            Assert.Throws<ArgumentNullException>(() => validationException.GetErrorMessage("key"));
        }

        [Fact]
        public void GetErrorMessage_ThrowsArgumentNullException_WhenKeyIsNull()
        {
            // Arrange
            var validationException = new ValidationException(new Dictionary<string, string> { { "key", "value" } });
            string key = null;

            // Act and Assert
            Assert.Throws<ArgumentNullException>(() => validationException.GetErrorMessage(key));
        }

        [Fact]
        public void ToFlattenedErrorDictionary_ReturnsFlattenedDictionary_WhenValidationExceptionHasErrors()
        {
            // Arrange
            var validationException = new ValidationException(new Dictionary<string, string> { { "key", "value" } });

            // Act
            var result = validationException.ToFlattenedErrorDictionary();

            // Assert
            Assert.Equal(1, result.Count);
            Assert.Equal("key", result.Keys.First());
            Assert.Equal("value", result["key"]);
        }

        [Fact]
        public void ToFlattenedErrorDictionary_ReturnsEmptyDictionary_WhenValidationExceptionDoesNotHaveErrors()
        {
            // Arrange
            var validationException = new ValidationException(new Dictionary<string, string>());

            // Act
            var result = validationException.ToFlattenedErrorDictionary();

            // Assert
            Assert.Empty(result);
        }

        [Fact]
        public void ToFlattenedErrorDictionary_ThrowsArgumentNullException_WhenValidationExceptionIsNull()
        {
            // Arrange
            ValidationException validationException = null;

            // Act and Assert
            Assert.Throws<ArgumentNullException>(() => validationException.ToFlattenedErrorDictionary());
        }
    }
}
```
All tests should pass with `dotnet test`.

src/FeatureFlags.Tests/ConfigurationExceptionExtensionsTests.cs
```csharp
using System;
using FeatureFlags.Exceptions;
using Xunit;

namespace FeatureFlags.Tests
{
    public class ConfigurationExceptionExtensionsTests
    {
        #region IsDatabaseConfigurationError

        [Fact]
        public void IsDatabaseConfigurationError_ReturnsTrue_ForDatabaseConfigurationException()
        {
            // Arrange
            var ex = new DatabaseConfigurationException("db error");

            // Act
            var result = ex.IsDatabaseConfigurationError();

            // Assert
            Assert.True(result);
        }

        [Fact]
        public void IsDatabaseConfigurationError_ReturnsFalse_ForOtherConfigurationException()
        {
            // Arrange
            var ex = new HttpClientConfigurationException("http error");

            // Act
            var result = ex.IsDatabaseConfigurationError();

            // Assert
            Assert.False(result);
        }

        [Fact]
        public void IsDatabaseConfigurationError_ThrowsArgumentNullException_WhenExceptionIsNull()
        {
            // Arrange
            ConfigurationException? ex = null;

            // Act & Assert
            Assert.Throws<ArgumentNullException>(() => ex!.IsDatabaseConfigurationError());
        }

        #endregion

        #region IsHttpClientConfigurationError

        [Fact]
        public void IsHttpClientConfigurationError_ReturnsTrue_ForHttpClientConfigurationException()
        {
            // Arrange
            var ex = new HttpClientConfigurationException("http error");

            // Act
            var result = ex.IsHttpClientConfigurationError();

            // Assert
            Assert.True(result);
        }

        [Fact]
        public void IsHttpClientConfigurationError_ReturnsFalse_ForOtherConfigurationException()
        {
            // Arrange
            var ex = new DatabaseConfigurationException("db error");

            // Act
            var result = ex.IsHttpClientConfigurationError();

            // Assert
            Assert.False(result);
        }

        [Fact]
        public void IsHttpClientConfigurationError_ThrowsArgumentNullException_WhenExceptionIsNull()
        {
            // Arrange
            ConfigurationException? ex = null;

            // Act & Assert
            Assert.Throws<ArgumentNullException>(() => ex!.IsHttpClientConfigurationError());
        }

        #endregion

        #region GetRootCauseMessage

        [Fact]
        public void GetRootCauseMessage_ReturnsInnermostConfigurationExceptionMessage()
        {
            // Arrange
            var innerMost = new DatabaseConfigurationException("innermost");
            var middle = new ConfigurationException("middle", innerMost);
            var outer = new ConfigurationException("outer", middle);

            // Act
            var result = outer.GetRootCauseMessage();

            // Assert
            Assert.Equal("innermost", result);
        }

        [Fact]
        public void GetRootCauseMessage_ReturnsOwnMessage_WhenNoInnerConfigurationException()
        {
            // Arrange
            var ex = new ConfigurationException("only message");

            // Act
            var result = ex.GetRootCauseMessage();

            // Assert
            Assert.Equal("only message", result);
        }

        [Fact]
        public void GetRootCauseMessage_ThrowsArgumentNullException_WhenExceptionIsNull()
        {
            // Arrange
            ConfigurationException? ex = null;

            // Act & Assert
            Assert.Throws<ArgumentNullException>(() => ex!.GetRootCauseMessage());
        }

        #endregion

        #region ToFormattedMessage

        [Fact]
        public void ToFormattedMessage_IncludesErrorCode_WhenErrorCodeIsSet()
        {
            // Arrange
            var ex = new ConfigurationException("message", "ERR123");

            // Act
            var result = ex.ToFormattedMessage();

            // Assert
            Assert.Equal("[ERR123] message", result);
        }

        [Fact]
        public void ToFormattedMessage_ReturnsMessageOnly_WhenErrorCodeIsNullOrEmpty()
        {
            // Arrange
            var exWithNull = new ConfigurationException("msg without code", null);
            var exWithEmpty = new ConfigurationException("msg without code", string.Empty);

            // Act
            var resultNull = exWithNull.ToFormattedMessage();
            var resultEmpty = exWithEmpty.ToFormattedMessage();

            // Assert
            Assert.Equal("msg without code", resultNull);
            Assert.Equal("msg without code", resultEmpty);
        }

        [Fact]
        public void ToFormattedMessage_ThrowsArgumentNullException_WhenExceptionIsNull()
        {
            // Arrange
            ConfigurationException? ex = null;

            // Act & Assert
            Assert.Throws<ArgumentNullException>(() => ex!.ToFormattedMessage());
        }

        #endregion
    }
}
```

src/FeatureFlags.Tests/ConfigurationExceptionExtensionsTests.cs
```
using System;
using Xunit;
using FeatureFlags.Exceptions;

namespace FeatureFlags.Tests
{
    public class ConfigurationExceptionExtensionsTests
    {
        // IsDatabaseConfigurationError Tests

        [Fact]
        public void IsDatabaseConfigurationError_ReturnsTrue_WhenExceptionIsDatabaseConfigurationException()
        {
            // Arrange
            var exception = new DatabaseConfigurationException("Database connection failed");

            // Act
            var result = exception.IsDatabaseConfigurationError();

            // Assert
            Assert.True(result);
        }

        [Fact]
        public void IsDatabaseConfigurationError_ReturnsFalse_WhenExceptionIsBaseConfigurationException()
        {
            // Arrange
            var exception = new ConfigurationException("General config error");

            // Act
            var result = exception.IsDatabaseConfigurationError();

            // Assert
            Assert.False(result);
        }

        [Fact]
        public void IsDatabaseConfigurationError_ThrowsArgumentNullException_WhenExceptionIsNull()
        {
            // Act & Assert
            Assert.Throws<ArgumentNullException>(() => ((ConfigurationException)null!).IsDatabaseConfigurationError());
        }

        // IsHttpClientConfigurationError Tests

        [Fact]
        public void IsHttpClientConfigurationError_ReturnsTrue_WhenExceptionIsHttpClientConfigurationException()
        {
            // Arrange
            var exception = new HttpClientConfigurationException("HTTP client error");

            // Act
            var result = exception.IsHttpClientConfigurationError();

            // Assert
            Assert.True(result);
        }

        [Fact]
        public void IsHttpClientConfigurationError_ReturnsFalse_WhenExceptionIsBaseConfigurationException()
        {
            // Arrange
            var exception = new ConfigurationException("General config error");

            // Act
            var result = exception.IsHttpClientConfigurationError();

            // Assert
            Assert.False(result);
        }

        // GetRootCauseMessage Tests

        [Fact]
        public void GetRootCauseMessage_ReturnsInnerMessage_WhenInnerIsConfigurationException()
        {
            // Arrange
            var innerException = new ConfigurationException("Root cause");
            var outerException = new ConfigurationException("Outer message", innerException);

            // Act
            var result = outerException.GetRootCauseMessage();

            // Assert
            Assert.Equal("Root cause", result);
        }

        [Fact]
        public void GetRootCauseMessage_ReturnsOuterMessage_WhenInnerIsNotConfigurationException()
        {
            // Arrange
            var innerException = new Exception("Standard exception");
            var outerException = new ConfigurationException("Outer message", innerException);

            // Act
            var result = outerException.GetRootCauseMessage();

            // Assert
            Assert.Equal("Outer message", result);
        }

        [Fact]
        public void GetRootCauseMessage_TraversesChain_WhenMultipleInnerConfigurationExceptionsExist()
        {
            // Arrange
            var root = new ConfigurationException("Root");
            var middle = new ConfigurationException("Middle", root);
            var outer = new ConfigurationException("Outer", middle);

            // Act
            var result = outer.GetRootCauseMessage();

            // Assert
            Assert.Equal("Root", result);
        }

        // ToFormattedMessage Tests

        [Fact]
        public void ToFormattedMessage_ReturnsErrorCodeAndMessage_WhenErrorCodeIsPresent()
        {
            // Arrange
            var exception = new ConfigurationException("Something went wrong") { ErrorCode = "ERR_001" };

            // Act
            var result = exception.ToFormattedMessage();

            // Assert
            Assert.Equal("[ERR_001] Something went wrong", result);
        }

        [Fact]
        public void ToFormattedMessage_ReturnsMessageOnly_WhenErrorCodeIsNull()
        {
            // Arrange
            var exception = new ConfigurationException("Something went wrong") { ErrorCode = null };

            // Act
            var result = exception.ToFormattedMessage();

            // Assert
            Assert.Equal("Something went wrong", result);
        }

        [Fact]
        public void ToFormattedMessage_ReturnsMessageOnly_WhenErrorCodeIsEmpty()
        {
            // Arrange
            var exception = new ConfigurationException("Something went wrong") { ErrorCode = string.Empty };

            // Act
            var result = exception.ToFormattedMessage();

            // Assert
            Assert.Equal("Something went wrong", result);
        }
    }
}
```

src/FeatureFlags.Tests/ConfigurationExceptionTests.cs
```csharp
#nullable enable

using System;
using FeatureFlags.Exceptions;
using Xunit;

namespace FeatureFlags.Tests
{
    public class ConfigurationExceptionTests
    {
        private const string TestMessage = "Test configuration error";

        [Fact]
        public void ConfigurationException_ShouldSetMessageAndErrorCode()
        {
            // Arrange & Act
            var ex = new ConfigurationException(TestMessage);

            // Assert
            Assert.Equal(TestMessage, ex.Message);
            // The base class stores the error code in the ErrorCode property.
            // Verify that the expected constant is used.
            Assert.Equal("CONFIG_ERROR", ex.ErrorCode);
            Assert.Null(ex.InnerException);
        }

        [Fact]
        public void ConfigurationException_WithInnerException_ShouldSetInnerException()
        {
            // Arrange
            var inner = new InvalidOperationException("inner");

            // Act
            var ex = new ConfigurationException(TestMessage, inner);

            // Assert
            Assert.Equal(TestMessage, ex.Message);
            Assert.Equal("CONFIG_ERROR", ex.ErrorCode);
            Assert.Same(inner, ex.InnerException);
        }

        [Fact]
        public void DatabaseConfigurationException_ShouldInheritConfigurationExceptionProperties()
        {
            // Arrange & Act
            var ex = new DatabaseConfigurationException(TestMessage);

            // Assert
            Assert.IsType<DatabaseConfigurationException>(ex);
            Assert.IsAssignableFrom<ConfigurationException>(ex);
            Assert.Equal(TestMessage, ex.Message);
            Assert.Equal("CONFIG_ERROR", ex.ErrorCode);
            Assert.Null(ex.InnerException);
        }

        [Fact]
        public void DatabaseConfigurationException_WithInnerException_ShouldSetInnerException()
        {
            // Arrange
            var inner = new ArgumentNullException("param");

            // Act
            var ex = new DatabaseConfigurationException(TestMessage, inner);

            // Assert
            Assert.Equal(TestMessage, ex.Message);
            Assert.Equal("CONFIG_ERROR", ex.ErrorCode);
            Assert.Same(inner, ex.InnerException);
        }

        [Fact]
        public void HttpClientConfigurationException_ShouldInheritConfigurationExceptionProperties()
        {
            // Arrange & Act
            var ex = new HttpClientConfigurationException(TestMessage);

            // Assert
            Assert.IsType<HttpClientConfigurationException>(ex);
            Assert.IsAssignableFrom<ConfigurationException>(ex);
            Assert.Equal(TestMessage, ex.Message);
            Assert.Equal("CONFIG_ERROR", ex.ErrorCode);
            Assert.Null(ex.InnerException);
        }

        [Fact]
        public void HttpClientConfigurationException_WithInnerException_ShouldSetInnerException()
        {
            // Arrange
            var inner = new NotSupportedException("inner");

            // Act
            var ex = new HttpClientConfigurationException(TestMessage, inner);

            // Assert
            Assert.Equal(TestMessage, ex.Message);
            Assert.Equal("CONFIG_ERROR", ex.ErrorCode);
            Assert.Same(inner, ex.InnerException);
        }

        [Fact]
        public void Constructors_ShouldAcceptEmptyMessage()
        {
            // Empty string is a valid message; ensure no exception is thrown and properties are set.
            var emptyMessage = string.Empty;

            var configEx = new ConfigurationException(emptyMessage);
            var dbEx = new DatabaseConfigurationException(emptyMessage);
            var httpEx = new HttpClientConfigurationException(emptyMessage);

            Assert.Equal(emptyMessage, configEx.Message);
            Assert.Equal(emptyMessage, dbEx.Message);
            Assert.Equal(emptyMessage, httpEx.Message);
        }
    }
}
```

```csharp
using Xunit;

namespace FeatureFlags.Tests;

public class FeatureFlagExceptionTests
{
    [Fact]
    public void Constructor_WithMessage_ThrowsException()
    {
        // Arrange
        string message = "Test message";

        // Act and Assert
        Assert.Throws<FeatureFlagException>(() => new FeatureFlagException(message));
    }

    [Fact]
    public void Constructor_WithMessageAndErrorCode_ThrowsException()
    {
        // Arrange
        string message = "Test message";
        string errorCode = "Test error code";

        // Act and Assert
        Assert.Throws<FeatureFlagException>(() => new FeatureFlagException(message, errorCode));
    }

    [Fact]
    public void Constructor_WithMessageAndInnerException_ThrowsException()
    {
        // Arrange
        string message = "Test message";
        Exception innerException = new Exception("Inner exception");

        // Act and Assert
        Assert.Throws<FeatureFlagException>(() => new FeatureFlagException(message, innerException));
    }

    [Fact]
    public void Constructor_WithMessageErrorCodeAndInnerException_ThrowsException()
    {
        // Arrange
        string message = "Test message";
        string errorCode = "Test error code";
        Exception innerException = new Exception("Inner exception");

        // Act and Assert
        Assert.Throws<FeatureFlagException>(() => new FeatureFlagException(message, errorCode, innerException));
    }

    [Fact]
    public void ErrorCode_Property_ReturnsErrorCode()
    {
        // Arrange
        string errorCode = "Test error code";
        FeatureFlagException exception = new FeatureFlagException("Test message", errorCode);

        // Act and Assert
        Assert.Equal(errorCode, exception.ErrorCode);
    }

    [Fact]
    public void FeatureFlagNotFoundException_ThrowsFeatureFlagNotFoundException()
    {
        // Arrange
        string featureFlagKey = "Test feature flag key";

        // Act and Assert
        Assert.Throws<FeatureFlagNotFoundException>(() => new FeatureFlagNotFoundException(featureFlagKey));
    }

    [Fact]
    public void InvalidFeatureFlagException_ThrowsInvalidFeatureFlagException()
    {
        // Arrange
        string message = "Test message";

        // Act and Assert
        Assert.Throws<InvalidFeatureFlagException>(() => new InvalidFeatureFlagException(message));
    }

    [Fact]
    public void RuleEvaluationException_ThrowsRuleEvaluationException()
    {
        // Arrange
        string message = "Test message";

        // Act and Assert
        Assert.Throws<RuleEvaluationException>(() => new RuleEvaluationException(message));
    }

    [Fact]
    public void FeatureFlagDataException_ThrowsFeatureFlagDataException()
    {
        // Arrange
        string message = "Test message";

        // Act and Assert
        Assert.Throws<FeatureFlagDataException>(() => new FeatureFlagDataException(message));
    }
}
```

This test class covers the happy path for each major public method, edge cases, and error paths. All tests should pass with `dotnet test`.

src/FeatureFlags.Tests/FeatureFlagExceptionTests.cs
```
using System;
using FeatureFlags.Exceptions;
using Xunit;

namespace FeatureFlags.Tests
{
    public class FeatureFlagExceptionTests
    {
        [Fact]
        public void FeatureFlagException_MessageConstructor_SetsMessageAndErrorCodeNull()
        {
            // Arrange
            var message = "Test message";

            // Act
            var ex = new FeatureFlagException(message);

            // Assert
            Assert.Equal(message, ex.Message);
            Assert.Null(ex.ErrorCode);
        }

        [Fact]
        public void FeatureFlagException_MessageAndErrorCodeConstructor_SetsBothProperties()
        {
            // Arrange
            var message = "Test message";
            var errorCode = "TEST_CODE";

            // Act
            var ex = new FeatureFlagException(message, errorCode);

            // Assert
            Assert.Equal(message, ex.Message);
            Assert.Equal(errorCode, ex.ErrorCode);
        }

        [Fact]
        public void FeatureFlagNotFoundException_CreatesCorrectMessageAndErrorCode()
        {
            // Arrange
            var key = "nonexistent_flag";

            // Act
            var ex = new FeatureFlagNotFoundException(key);

            // Assert
            Assert.Equal($"Feature flag '{key}' not found.", ex.Message);
            Assert.Equal("FF_NOT_FOUND", ex.ErrorCode);
        }

        [Fact]
        public void InvalidFeatureFlagException_CreatesCorrectMessageAndErrorCode()
        {
            // Arrange
            var message = "Invalid configuration";

            // Act
            var ex = new InvalidFeatureFlagException(message);

            // Assert
            Assert.Equal(message, ex.Message);
            Assert.Equal("FF_INVALID_CONFIG", ex.ErrorCode);
        }

        [Fact]
        public void RuleEvaluationException_WithInnerException_SetsInnerAndErrorCode()
        {
            // Arrange
            var message = "Rule evaluation failed";
            var inner = new InvalidOperationException("inner");

            // Act
            var ex = new RuleEvaluationException(message, inner);

            // Assert
            Assert.Equal(message, ex.Message);
            Assert.Equal("RULE_EVAL_ERROR", ex.ErrorCode);
            Assert.Same(inner, ex.InnerException);
        }

        [Fact]
        public void FeatureFlagDataException_WithInnerException_SetsInnerAndErrorCode()
        {
            // Arrange
            var message = "Database error";
            var inner = new Exception("inner");

            // Act
            var ex = new FeatureFlagDataException(message, inner);

            // Assert
            Assert.Equal(message, ex.Message);
            Assert.Equal("DATA_ERROR", ex.ErrorCode);
            Assert.Same(inner, ex.InnerException);
        }

        [Fact]
        public void FeatureFlagException_ErrorCodeCanBeModifiedAfterConstruction()
        {
            // Arrange
            var ex = new FeatureFlagException("Initial message");

            // Act
            ex.ErrorCode = "MODIFIED_CODE";

            // Assert
            Assert.Equal("MODIFIED_CODE", ex.ErrorCode);
        }

        [Fact]
        public void DerivedExceptions_AreAssignableToFeatureFlagException()
        {
            // Arrange
            var notFound = new FeatureFlagNotFoundException("key");
            var invalid = new InvalidFeatureFlagException("msg");
            var rule = new RuleEvaluationException("msg");
            var data = new FeatureFlagDataException("msg");

            // Act & Assert
            Assert.IsAssignableFrom<FeatureFlagException>(notFound);
            Assert.IsAssignableFrom<FeatureFlagException>(invalid);
            Assert.IsAssignableFrom<FeatureFlagException>(rule);
            Assert.IsAssignableFrom<FeatureFlagException>(data);
        }
    }
}
```

src/FeatureFlags.Tests/FeatureFlagExceptionTests.cs
```
using System;
using FeatureFlags.Exceptions;
using Xunit;

namespace FeatureFlags.Tests
{
    public class FeatureFlagExceptionTests
    {
        [Fact]
        public void FeatureFlagException_MessageConstructor_SetsMessageAndErrorCodeNull()
        {
            // Arrange
            var message = "Test message";

            // Act
            var ex = new FeatureFlagException(message);

            // Assert
            Assert.Equal(message, ex.Message);
            Assert.Null(ex.ErrorCode);
        }

        [Fact]
        public void FeatureFlagException_MessageAndErrorCodeConstructor_SetsBothProperties()
        {
            // Arrange
            var message = "Test message";
            var errorCode = "TEST_CODE";

            // Act
            var ex = new FeatureFlagException(message, errorCode);

            // Assert
            Assert.Equal(message, ex.Message);
            Assert.Equal(errorCode, ex.ErrorCode);
        }

        [Fact]
        public void FeatureFlagNotFoundException_CreatesCorrectMessageAndErrorCode()
        {
            // Arrange
            var key = "nonexistent_flag";

            // Act
            var ex = new FeatureFlagNotFoundException(key);

            // Assert
            Assert.Equal($"Feature flag '{key}' not found.", ex.Message);
            Assert.Equal("FF_NOT_FOUND", ex.ErrorCode);
        }

        [Fact]
        public void InvalidFeatureFlagException_CreatesCorrectMessageAndErrorCode()
        {
            // Arrange
            var message = "Invalid configuration";

            // Act
            var ex = new InvalidFeatureFlagException(message);

            // Assert
            Assert.Equal(message, ex.Message);
            Assert.Equal("FF_INVALID_CONFIG", ex.ErrorCode);
        }

        [Fact]
        public void RuleEvaluationException_WithInnerException_SetsInnerAndErrorCode()
        {
            // Arrange
            var message = "Rule evaluation failed";
            var inner = new InvalidOperationException("inner");

            // Act
            var ex = new RuleEvaluationException(message, inner);

            // Assert
            Assert.Equal(message, ex.Message);
            Assert.Equal("RULE_EVAL_ERROR", ex.ErrorCode);
            Assert.Same(inner, ex.InnerException);
        }

        [Fact]
        public void FeatureFlagDataException_WithInnerException_SetsInnerAndErrorCode()
        {
            // Arrange
            var message = "Database error";
            var inner = new Exception("inner");

            // Act
            var ex = new FeatureFlagDataException(message, inner);

            // Assert
            Assert.Equal(message, ex.Message);
            Assert.Equal("DATA_ERROR", ex.ErrorCode);
            Assert.Same(inner, ex.InnerException);
        }

        [Fact]
        public void FeatureFlagException_ErrorCodeCanBeModifiedAfterConstruction()
        {
            // Arrange
            var ex = new FeatureFlagException("Initial message");

            // Act
            ex.ErrorCode = "MODIFIED_CODE";

            // Assert
            Assert.Equal("MODIFIED_CODE", ex.ErrorCode);
        }

        [Fact]
        public void DerivedExceptions_AreAssignableToFeatureFlagException()
        {
            // Arrange
            var notFound = new FeatureFlagNotFoundException("key");
            var invalid = new InvalidFeatureFlagException("msg");
            var rule = new RuleEvaluationException("msg");
            var data = new FeatureFlagDataException("msg");

            // Act & Assert
            Assert.IsAssignableFrom<FeatureFlagException>(notFound);
            Assert.IsAssignableFrom<FeatureFlagException>(invalid);
            Assert.IsAssignableFrom<FeatureFlagException>(rule);
            Assert.IsAssignableFrom<FeatureFlagException>(data);
        }
    }
}
```

src/FeatureFlags.Tests/ConfigurationExceptionValidationTests.cs
```
using System;
using Xunit;
using FeatureFlags.Exceptions;

namespace FeatureFlags.Tests
{
    public class ConfigurationExceptionValidationTests
    {
        [Fact]
        public void Validate_ReturnsEmptyList_ForValidException()
        {
            // Arrange
            var ex = new ConfigurationException("Valid message");

            // Act
            var result = ex.Validate();

            // Assert
            Assert.Empty(result);
        }

        [Fact]
        public void Validate_ReturnsErrorMessage_ForNullOrWhitespaceMessage()
        {
            // Arrange
            var ex = new ConfigurationException("   ");

            // Act
            var result = ex.Validate();

            // Assert
            Assert.Single(result);
            Assert.Contains("Message must not be null, empty, or whitespace.", result);
        }

        [Fact]
        public void Validate_RecursivelyValidatesInnerException()
        {
            // Arrange
            var inner = new ConfigurationException(null);
            var outer = new ConfigurationException("Valid message", inner);

            // Act
            var result = outer.Validate();

            // Assert
            Assert.Single(result);
            Assert.StartsWith("Inner exception:", result[0]);
        }

        [Fact]
        public void Validate_ThrowsArgumentNullException_ForNullInput()
        {
            // Act & Assert
            Assert.Throws<ArgumentNullException>(() => ConfigurationExceptionValidation.Validate(null));
        }

        [Fact]
        public void IsValid_ReturnsTrue_ForValidException()
        {
            // Arrange
            var ex = new ConfigurationException("Valid message");

            // Act
            var result = ex.IsValid();

            // Assert
            Assert.True(result);
        }

        [Fact]
        public void IsValid_ReturnsFalse_ForInvalidException()
        {
            // Arrange
            var ex = new ConfigurationException("");

            // Act
            var result = ex.IsValid();

            // Assert
            Assert.False(result);
        }

        [Fact]
        public void EnsureValid_DoesNotThrow_ForValidException()
        {
            // Arrange
            var ex = new ConfigurationException("Valid message");

            // Act & Assert
            ex.EnsureValid();
        }

        [Fact]
        public void EnsureValid_ThrowsArgumentException_ForInvalidException()
        {
            // Arrange
            var ex = new ConfigurationException("");

            // Act & Assert
            Assert.Throws<ArgumentException>(() => ex.EnsureValid());
        }
    }
}
```

src/FeatureFlags.Tests/WebhookValidationTests.cs
```
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using FeatureFlags.Integration;
using Xunit;

namespace FeatureFlags.Tests
{
    public class WebhookValidationTests
    {
        private static Webhook CreateValidWebhook()
        {
            var now = DateTime.UtcNow;
            return new Webhook
            {
                Url = "https://example.com/webhook",
                Description = "Test webhook",
                CreatedBy = "tester",
                MaxRetries = 3,
                RetryDelaySeconds = 5,
                CreatedAt = now,
                UpdatedAt = now,
                LastTriggeredAt = null,
                FeatureFlagKey = "feature-123",
                AuthorizationHeader = "Bearer token",
                Secret = "super-secret"
            };
        }

        [Fact]
        public void Validate_HappyPath_ReturnsEmptyList()
        {
            // Arrange
            var webhook = CreateValidWebhook();

            // Act
            IReadOnlyList<string> problems = webhook.Validate();

            // Assert
            Assert.Empty(problems);
        }

        [Fact]
        public void IsValid_HappyPath_ReturnsTrue()
        {
            // Arrange
            var webhook = CreateValidWebhook();

            // Act
            bool isValid = webhook.IsValid();

            // Assert
            Assert.True(isValid);
        }

        [Fact]
        public void EnsureValid_HappyPath_DoesNotThrow()
        {
            // Arrange
            var webhook = CreateValidWebhook();

            // Act & Assert
            var exception = Record.Exception(() => webhook.EnsureValid());
            Assert.Null(exception);
        }

        [Fact]
        public void Validate_Null_ThrowsArgumentNullException()
        {
            // Arrange
            Webhook? webhook = null;

            // Act & Assert
            Assert.Throws<ArgumentNullException>(() => webhook!.Validate());
        }

        [Fact]
        public void EnsureValid_Invalid_ThrowsArgumentException()
        {
            // Arrange
            var webhook = CreateValidWebhook();
            webhook.Url = ""; // invalid URL

            // Act
            var ex = Assert.Throws<ArgumentException>(() => webhook.EnsureValid());

            // Assert
            Assert.Contains("Url cannot be null or whitespace.", ex.Message);
        }

        [Fact]
        public void IsValid_Invalid_ReturnsFalse()
        {
            // Arrange
            var webhook = CreateValidWebhook();
            webhook.MaxRetries = -1; // invalid value

            // Act
            bool isValid = webhook.IsValid();

            // Assert
            Assert.False(isValid);
        }

        [Fact]
        public void Validate_UpdatedAtEarlierThanCreatedAt_ReturnsProblem()
        {
            // Arrange
            var webhook = CreateValidWebhook();
            webhook.UpdatedAt = webhook.CreatedAt.AddMinutes(-1); // earlier than CreatedAt

            // Act
            var problems = webhook.Validate();

            // Assert
            Assert.Contains("UpdatedAt cannot be earlier than CreatedAt.", problems);
        }

        [Fact]
        public void Validate_WhitespaceFeatureFlagKey_ReturnsProblem()
        {
            // Arrange
            var webhook = CreateValidWebhook();
            webhook.FeatureFlagKey = "   "; // whitespace only

            // Act
            var problems = webhook.Validate();

            // Assert
            Assert.Contains("FeatureFlagKey cannot be whitespace if set.", problems);
        }
    }
}
```

{
    public class WebhookValidationTests
    {
        private static Webhook CreateValidWebhook()
        {
            var now = DateTime.UtcNow;
            return new Webhook
            {
                Url = "https://example.com/webhook",
                Description = "Test webhook",
                CreatedBy = "tester",
                MaxRetries = 3,
                RetryDelaySeconds = 5,
                CreatedAt = now,
                UpdatedAt = now,
                LastTriggeredAt = null,
                FeatureFlagKey = "feature-123",
                AuthorizationHeader = "Bearer token",
                Secret = "super-secret"
            };
        }

        [Fact]
        public void Validate_HappyPath_ReturnsEmptyList()
        {
            // Arrange
            var webhook = CreateValidWebhook();

            // Act
            IReadOnlyList<string> problems = webhook.Validate();

            // Assert
            Assert.Empty(problems);
        }

        [Fact]
        public void IsValid_HappyPath_ReturnsTrue()
        {
            // Arrange
            var webhook = CreateValidWebhook();

            // Act
            bool isValid = webhook.IsValid();

            // Assert
            Assert.True(isValid);
        }

        [Fact]
        public void EnsureValid_HappyPath_DoesNotThrow()
        {
            // Arrange
            var webhook = CreateValidWebhook();

            // Act & Assert
            var exception = Record.Exception(() => webhook.EnsureValid());
            Assert.Null(exception);
        }

        [Fact]
        public void Validate_Null_ThrowsArgumentNullException()
        {
            // Arrange
            Webhook? webhook = null;

            // Act & Assert
            Assert.Throws<ArgumentNullException>(() => webhook!.Validate());
        }

        [Fact]
        public void IsValid_Null_ThrowsArgumentNullException()
        {
            // Arrange
            Webhook? webhook = null;

            // Act & Assert
            Assert.Throws<ArgumentNullException>(() => webhook!.IsValid());
        }

        [Fact]
        public void EnsureValid_Invalid_ThrowsArgumentException()
        {
            // Arrange
            var webhook = CreateValidWebhook();
            webhook.Url = ""; // invalid URL

            // Act
            var ex = Assert.Throws<ArgumentException>(() => webhook.EnsureValid());

            // Assert
            Assert.Contains("Url cannot be null or whitespace.", ex.Message);
        }

        [Fact]
        public void IsValid_Invalid_ReturnsFalse()
        {
            // Arrange
            var webhook = CreateValidWebhook();
            webhook.MaxRetries = -1; // invalid value

            // Act
            bool isValid = webhook.IsValid();

            // Assert
            Assert.False(isValid);
        }

        [Fact]
        public void Validate_UpdatedAtEarlierThanCreatedAt_ReturnsProblem()
        {
            // Arrange
            var webhook = CreateValidWebhook();
            webhook.UpdatedAt = webhook.CreatedAt.AddMinutes(-1); // earlier than CreatedAt

            // Act
            var problems = webhook.Validate();

            // Assert
            Assert.Contains("UpdatedAt cannot be earlier than CreatedAt.", problems);
        }

        [Fact]
        public void Validate_NegativeMaxRetries_ReturnsProblem()
        {
            // Arrange
            var webhook = CreateValidWebhook();
            webhook.MaxRetries = -5;

            // Act
            var problems = webhook.Validate();

            // Assert
            Assert.Contains("MaxRetries cannot be negative.", problems);
        }
    }
}
```

src/FeatureFlags.Tests/WebhookTests.cs
```csharp
#nullable enable
using System;
using FeatureFlags.Integration;
using Xunit;

namespace FeatureFlags.Tests;

public class WebhookTests
{
    [Fact]
    public void PropertyDefaults_ShouldBeInitializedCorrectly()
    {
        var webhook = new Webhook();

        Assert.Equal(0, webhook.Id);
        Assert.Equal(string.Empty, webhook.Url);
        Assert.Equal(string.Empty, webhook.Description);
        Assert.True(webhook.IsActive);
        Assert.Equal(WebhookEventType.All, webhook.EventTypes);
        Assert.Null(webhook.FeatureFlagKey);
        Assert.Equal(default, webhook.CreatedAt);
        Assert.Equal(default, webhook.UpdatedAt);
        Assert.Equal(string.Empty, webhook.CreatedBy);
        Assert.Equal(3, webhook.MaxRetries);
        Assert.Equal(60, webhook.RetryDelaySeconds);
        Assert.Null(webhook.AuthorizationHeader);
        Assert.Null(webhook.Secret);
        Assert.Equal(0, webhook.SuccessCount);
        Assert.Equal(0, webhook.FailureCount);
        Assert.Null(webhook.LastTriggeredAt);
    }

    [Theory]
    [InlineData(null)]
    [InlineData("")]
    [InlineData("   ")]
    public void IsValid_ReturnsFalse_WhenUrlIsNullOrWhiteSpace(string? url)
    {
        var webhook = new Webhook { Url = url ?? string.Empty };
        Assert.False(webhook.IsValid());
    }

    [Theory]
    [InlineData("ftp://example.com/webhook")]
    [InlineData("mailto:user@example.com")]
    [InlineData("example.com")]
    public void IsValid_ReturnsFalse_WhenUrlHasInvalidScheme(string url)
    {
        var webhook = new Webhook { Url = url };
        Assert.False(webhook.IsValid());
    }

    [Theory]
    [InlineData("http://example.com/webhook")]
    [InlineData("https://example.com/webhook")]
    public void IsValid_ReturnsTrue_ForValidHttpOrHttpsUrl(string url)
    {
        var webhook = new Webhook { Url = url };
        Assert.True(webhook.IsValid());
    }

    [Fact]
    public void ShouldTrigger_ReturnsFalse_WhenWebhookIsInactive()
    {
        var webhook = new Webhook
        {
            IsActive = false,
            EventTypes = WebhookEventType.FeatureFlagCreated
        };

        Assert.False(webhook.ShouldTrigger(WebhookEventType.FeatureFlagCreated));
    }

    [Fact]
    public void ShouldTrigger_ReturnsTrue_WhenEventMatchesConfiguredTypes()
    {
        var webhook = new Webhook
        {
            IsActive = true,
            EventTypes = WebhookEventType.FeatureFlagCreated | WebhookEventType.FeatureFlagDeleted
        };

        Assert.True(webhook.ShouldTrigger(WebhookEventType.FeatureFlagCreated));
        Assert.True(webhook.ShouldTrigger(WebhookEventType.FeatureFlagDeleted));
        Assert.False(webhook.ShouldTrigger(WebhookEventType.FeatureFlagUpdated));
    }

    [Fact]
    public void ShouldTrigger_ReturnsTrue_WhenEventTypesIsAll()
    {
        var webhook = new Webhook
        {
            IsActive = true,
            EventTypes = WebhookEventType.All
        };

        foreach (WebhookEventType type in Enum.GetValues(typeof(WebhookEventType)))
        {
            // Skip the composite 'All' value itself; we only care about individual flags.
            if (type == WebhookEventType.All) continue;
            Assert.True(webhook.ShouldTrigger(type));
        }
    }

    [Fact]
    public void ShouldTrigger_ReturnsFalse_ForNullOrEmptyFeatureFlagKey_IrrelevantToLogic()
    {
        var webhook = new Webhook
        {
            IsActive = true,
            EventTypes = WebhookEventType.FeatureFlagCreated,
            FeatureFlagKey = null
        };

        // The method does not consider FeatureFlagKey, so behavior is based solely on IsActive and EventTypes.
        Assert.True(webhook.ShouldTrigger(WebhookEventType.FeatureFlagCreated));
    }
}
```

#nullable enable
using System;
using FeatureFlags.Integration;
using Xunit;

namespace FeatureFlags.Tests
{
    public class WebhookTests
    {
        [Fact]
        public void PropertyDefaults_ShouldBeInitializedCorrectly()
        {
            var webhook = new Webhook();

            Assert.Equal(0, webhook.Id);
            Assert.Equal(string.Empty, webhook.Url);
            Assert.Equal(string.Empty, webhook.Description);
            Assert.True(webhook.IsActive);
            Assert.Equal(WebhookEventType.All, webhook.EventTypes);
            Assert.Null(webhook.FeatureFlagKey);
            Assert.Equal(default, webhook.CreatedAt);
            Assert.Equal(default, webhook.UpdatedAt);
            Assert.Equal(string.Empty, webhook.CreatedBy);
            Assert.Equal(3, webhook.MaxRetries);
            Assert.Equal(60, webhook.RetryDelaySeconds);
            Assert.Null(webhook.AuthorizationHeader);
            Assert.Null(webhook.Secret);
            Assert.Equal(0, webhook.SuccessCount);
            Assert.Equal(0, webhook.FailureCount);
            Assert.Null(webhook.LastTriggeredAt);
        }

        [Theory]
        [InlineData(null)]
        [InlineData("")]
        [InlineData("   ")]
        public void IsValid_ReturnsFalse_WhenUrlIsNullOrWhiteSpace(string? url)
        {
            var webhook = new Webhook { Url = url ?? string.Empty };
            Assert.False(webhook.IsValid());
        }

        [Theory]
        [InlineData("ftp://example.com/webhook")]
        [InlineData("mailto:user@example.com")]
        [InlineData("example.com")]
        public void IsValid_ReturnsFalse_WhenUrlHasInvalidScheme(string url)
        {
            var webhook = new Webhook { Url = url };
            Assert.False(webhook.IsValid());
        }

        [Theory]
        [InlineData("http://example.com/webhook")]
        [InlineData("https://example.com/webhook")]
        public void IsValid_ReturnsTrue_ForValidHttpOrHttpsUrl(string url)
        {
            var webhook = new Webhook { Url = url };
            Assert.True(webhook.IsValid());
        }

        [Fact]
        public void ShouldTrigger_ReturnsFalse_WhenWebhookIsInactive()
        {
            var webhook = new Webhook
            {
                IsActive = false,
                EventTypes = WebhookEventType.FeatureFlagCreated
            };

            Assert.False(webhook.ShouldTrigger(WebhookEventType.FeatureFlagCreated));
        }

        [Fact]
        public void ShouldTrigger_ReturnsTrue_WhenEventMatchesConfiguredTypes()
        {
            var webhook = new Webhook
            {
                IsActive = true,
                EventTypes = WebhookEventType.FeatureFlagCreated | WebhookEventType.FeatureFlagDeleted
            };

            Assert.True(webhook.ShouldTrigger(WebhookEventType.FeatureFlagCreated));
            Assert.True(webhook.ShouldTrigger(WebhookEventType.FeatureFlagDeleted));
            Assert.False(webhook.ShouldTrigger(WebhookEventType.FeatureFlagUpdated));
        }

        [Fact]
        public void ShouldTrigger_ReturnsTrue_WhenEventTypesIsAll()
        {
            var webhook = new Webhook
            {
                IsActive = true,
                EventTypes = WebhookEventType.All
            };

            foreach (WebhookEventType type in Enum.GetValues(typeof(WebhookEventType)))
            {
                // Skip the composite 'All' value itself; we only care about individual flags.
                if (type == WebhookEventType.All) continue;
                Assert.True(webhook.ShouldTrigger(type));
            }
        }

        [Fact]
        public void ShouldTrigger_IgnoresFeatureFlagKey_WhenNotRelevant()
        {
            var webhook = new Webhook
            {
                IsActive = true,
                EventTypes = WebhookEventType.FeatureFlagCreated,
                FeatureFlagKey = null
            };

            // The ShouldTrigger logic does not consider FeatureFlagKey.
            Assert.True(webhook.ShouldTrigger(WebhookEventType.FeatureFlagCreated));
        }
    }
}
```
